name: GMDPE
description: Geometry More Dash Physical Extension — a feature-rich hack menu with cheats and QoL tools.

noclip-opacity.name: Noclip Opacity
noclip-opacity.description: Player opacity while noclip is active (0 = invisible, 1 = normal).

straight-fly.name: Straight Fly
straight-fly.description: Forces the ship to fly in a straight horizontal line.

straight-fly-smoothness.name: Straight Fly Smoothness
straight-fly-smoothness.description: How smoothly the ship straightens out. 100% = instant lock.

auto-clicker.name: Auto Clicker
auto-clicker.description: Automatically clicks at a set interval.

auto-clicker-cps.name: Auto Clicker CPS
auto-clicker-cps.description: Clicks per second for the auto clicker.

respawn-bypass.name: Instant Respawn
respawn-bypass.description: Skip the death animation and respawn instantly.

fps-bypass.name: FPS Bypass
fps-bypass.description: Remove the 240 FPS cap and unlock unlimited frame rate.

fps-value.name: FPS Limit
fps-value.description: Target FPS when FPS Bypass is enabled.

tps-bypass.name: TPS Bypass
tps-bypass.description: Decouple game physics ticks from FPS for smoother gameplay at high framerates.

tps-value.name: TPS Value
tps-value.description: Physics ticks per second (default game value is 240).

speedhack.name: Speedhack
speedhack.description: Change the overall game speed multiplier.

show-hitboxes.name: Show Hitboxes
show-hitboxes.description: Render hitboxes of all objects in the level.

show-hitboxes-on-death.name: Show Hitboxes on Death Only
show-hitboxes-on-death.description: Only show hitboxes the moment you die.

solid-wave-trail.name: Solid Wave Trail
solid-wave-trail.description: Replaces the dotted wave trail with a solid line.

no-death-effects.name: No Death Effects
no-death-effects.description: Disable the explosion particle effect on death.

show-cps.name: Show CPS Counter
show-cps.description: Display a clicks-per-second counter during gameplay.

show-noclip-deaths.name: Noclip Death Counter
show-noclip-deaths.description: Show how many times you would have died with noclip enabled.

show-attempts.name: Show Attempt Number
show-attempts.description: Display the current attempt number on-screen during gameplay.

startpos-switcher.name: StartPos Switcher
startpos-switcher.description: Use arrow keys (or swipe) to quickly switch between StartPos objects.

practice-music-sync.name: Practice Music Sync
practice-music-sync.description: Play level music from the correct position in practice mode.

unlock-all-icons.name: Unlock All Icons (Visual)
unlock-all-icons.description: Show all icons as unlocked locally. Does NOT affect the server or other players.

ignore-esx.name: Ignore ESP / Anti-Cheat
ignore-esx.description: Suppress the in-game cheat indicator (green dot) when hacks are active.
